category_sources: source_facts.description says Fuego is a collection of C++ libraries for the game of Go; official site says it includes a Go player using Monte Carlo tree search.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official site title use Fuego.
docs_sources: Official Fuego SourceForge site links to developer documentation for the current 1.1 release.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is the official SourceForge SVN trunk URL used by the package formula.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official Fuego site describe C++ Go-game libraries and a Monte Carlo tree search Go player.
